messages: You're all set with your PokéCard Vault!
Head to the Poké Hub when you're ready for your first card.
Great — you've got your trainer bag!
Here, take this PokéCards Vault to help you manage your PokéCards...
Store, manage, and track all your discovered PokeCards.
Welcome, trainer!
Grab your trainer bag near the spawn plaza first — look for the box just near the fountain.
Come back once you're equipped!
Hey! Welcome to PokeCards Quests!
Go explore the realm — collect cards, finish quests, and build your legend.
Also, look out for Notices and Boards.
Wish you all the best in this journey!
npcs.name: Dr Ray

messages: I've been searching for a Layer-2 PokeCard here for hours!
Maybe my next find will finally be the rare PokeCard Layer-2 I'm looking for...
npcs.name: Xeno

messages: PokéCards Hub seems closed for now! I heard it should be opening soon.
Don't worry! Spin the PokéCard Vending Machine for 1,000 $POKE on your first draw — later spins cost 2,000 each.
Make sure your Wallet is verified first. You'll need it to claim your very first PokéCard.
I just got a Charizard Card, ahahaha! What are the chances?
Really Excited for my first battle.
npcs.name: Cristy

interaction.message: Pokéhub is currently under maintenance! Please be careful while following the steps. If you need any help, reach out to the manager on duty. He will help you!
interaction.title: NOTICE

interaction.message: Step through to go back.
interaction.title: Return to Nova City

messages: Your PokéTab is ready — open your bag anytime to stay connected with trainers worldwide.
Hey Trainer! The PokéHub is currently undergoing maintenance while our team prepares exciting new features for launch in a few days.
We're still waiting on some updates from Pokémon League HQ, so a few areas remain locked for now.
But don't worry—you've come this far! Take this PokéTab and connect with Trainers from all around the world.
Chat, send messages, find active Trainers online, and challenge them to PokéCard battles while you wait for the adventure to begin!
Welcome to the PokéHub!
You'll need your trainer bag before I can set you up with a PokéTab.
Head back to Nova City and grab your bag near the spawn plaza first.
Welcome to the PokéHub ground floor. Talk to me when you're ready for your PokéTab.
npcs.name: Manager
